items.briefing:
A data breach affecting Canvas, the widely used learning management platform, has put the global education sector on alert — including Australian registered training organisations that rely on similar digital tools. This is a timely reminder that educational platforms storing student and staff data are attractive targets for cybercriminals. RTOs should review what data they hold in cloud-based learning systems and ensure access controls and breach response plans are current.

Separately, a new report highlights that AI use is fuelling workplace disputes in Australia, a trend worth monitoring as staff increasingly use AI tools in daily work.

**Practical tip:** Check that your LMS (e.g. Canvas, Moodle) has multi-factor authentication enabled for all staff and admin accounts.

featured.title: Canvas breach puts global education cyber risk in focus
featured.quote: Major Canvas breach exposes hundreds of millions of student records, directly impacting Australian universities.
